title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE SARA HIGH SCHOOL TO VICTORINO SALCEDO HIGH SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2376 / 45 OG No. 7, 2773 (July, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 375, June 14, 1949 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE SARA HIGH SCHOOL TO VICTORINO SALCEDO HIGH SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In recognition of the meritorious services tendered by Victorino Salcedo to the municipality of Sara, Province of Iloilo, the name of Sara High School hereby changed to Victorino Salcedo High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1949.
